name: RichEditor
description: RichEditorToolbar (composable container), RichEditorItem (Text/Dropdown/Icon/Color button, Default/Hover/Active states, chevron flips direction when active), RichEditorDivider, and RichEditorColorDot (10 colors).
sourceNote: Figma defined 4 rigid toolbar variants (each a fixed subset/ordering of items — full, Header+size-only, formatting-only, comment/link/mention-only). Generalized into a composable RichEditorToolbar that accepts any combination of RichEditorItem/RichEditorDivider children, since real rich-text editors need arbitrary toolbar configurations, not 4 fixed presets — the Gallery story recreates all 4 Figma variants purely via composition. Color mapping matches Badge/ColorDots' 10-color set exactly.

active.description: Persistent pressed/toggled state, e.g. Bold currently applied
